name: Training Data & Quality Benchmarks
description: Test cases, example prompts, quality benchmarks, and design guidelines.

test_suites.name: Brand Style Parsing Tests
coverage: Brand context with full data formatting
Full override flow (query brand + template → template wins)

example_prompts: Create a presentation about AI in healthcare
Create a 10-slide presentation about AI trends in 2026
Startup pitch deck for SaaS product
Create a Nike-branded presentation about sustainable innovation
Create a presentation about quantum computing for enterprise IT leaders

rules: No custom fonts, colors, SmartArt, or animations
Standard slide ordering: Title, Content, Closing

agent_instructions.content: Enforce standard structure, limit complexity for template compatibility
agent_instructions.image_planning: Title YES, data NO, existing images NEVER, closing NO
agent_instructions.visual_review: Senior UI/UX designer persona, severity-based assessment

template_assembly.principle: Deterministic — no LLM in the loop
template_assembly.knowledge_file: Built once before any slide construction; single source of truth
template_assembly.content_area: Derived from template placeholders, not hardcoded
